visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a man in a motorcycle helmet riding a scooter on an urban road with clear blue skies and trees in the background. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and promotional text are overlaid on the screen. (2) The scene cuts to a refrigerated meat section inside a retail store, showing packages of beef rib fingers with large yellow price tags. (3) Transition to another refrigerated shelf displaying packages of prime boneless short ribs, followed by frozen bags of sea bass. (4) The sequence shifts to snack aisles, showing stacked boxes of seaweed almond crisps, green pea snacks, and almond cookies. (5) A montage of various products follows, including boxes of Pocky, curry chicken jerky, panda-shaped cookies, and orange juice cartons. (6) More products are shown in rapid succession: crackers, oatmeal bites, scallop potato chips, and bottles of red wine from the US and South Africa. (7) The camera captures food and drink items like walnuts, Fuji apples, chocolate oat milk, kimchi jars, and Quaker cereal drinks. (8) Daily essentials and deli items appear next, including milk tea, cheese balls, Japanese-style char siu, cinnamon rolls, and frozen mixed vegetables. (9) The final section features household and healthcare items such as laundry detergent, vitamins, disposable razors, and large pink plush bears, all presented in their retail packaging with discount information.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多 每週特價速報 03/03~03/09 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Slogan]: 美國特選 牛肋條真空包 原價575/KG -115 特價460/KG. (3) [Slogan]: 美國頂級 無骨牛小排 原價1869/KG -169 特價1700/KG. (4) [Slogan]: 生凍調味海鱸魚 原價469 -170 特價299. (5) [Slogan]: 萬歲牌 柿米果海苔杏仁小魚 原價549 -110 特價439. (6) [Slogan]: 盛香珍 蒜片青豆 原價239 -50 特價189. (7) [Slogan]: 義美 雙果仁煎餅 原價269 -54 特價215. (8) [Slogan]: POCKY 冬季限定棒餅組 原價369 -80 特價289. (9) [Slogan]: 美珍香 休閒咖哩雞肉乾 原價469 -95 特價374. (10) [Slogan]: 明治 貓熊夾心餅乾組 原價499 -100 特價399. (11) [Slogan]: 嘉芬娜 橙香多酚蔬果汁 原價499 -100 特價399. (12) [Slogan]: 麗滋小圓餅乾 原價299 -60 特價239. (13) [Slogan]: RICHY 迷你燕麥酥 原價319 -65 特價254. (14) [Slogan]: 樂事北海道 嫩煎干貝洋芋片 原價229 -50 特價179. (15) [Slogan]: MENAGE A TROIS 美國紅葡萄酒 原價379 -80 特價299.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator appearing at the beginning of the video riding a scooter.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man is wearing a gray motorcycle helmet and a light-colored jacket while riding.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts on an open road with a clear sky and foliage; transitions to the interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring industrial shelving, refrigerators, and bulk-packaged goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy acoustic pop music featuring a strummed guitar and a light beat. A male narrator greets the audience with an enthusiastic tone, introducing the Costco special report. (2) Each new product shown visually is accompanied by a 'whoosh' sound effect that syncs with the fast visual cuts. The narrator speaks rapidly, reading the product names and discount amounts in a consistent, upbeat rhythm. (3) Subtle 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects punctuate the end of price announcements for major categories like meat and snacks. The background music maintains a constant tempo and volume, providing a bright, positive bed for the fast-paced narration. (4) As the video progresses through dozens of items, the vocal delivery remains energetic with high pitch variability to maintain listener engagement. No significant ambient noise or environmental sounds are present, indicating a post-produced studio recording for the voice-over.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequential Showcase -> Implicit CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional digest for weekly discounts at Costco (dated March 3 to March 9). It aims to inform regular shoppers of specific savings across various categories including fresh food, dry snacks, alcohol, and household goods to drive store traffic and sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing Costco's specific brand offerings and weekly price discounts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-density, social-media-native promotional video characterized by extremely fast editing and a large volume of visual/textual information designed to retain attention through rapid item showcasing.
